action.reasoning: Observation: 18-model ensemble with exponential weighting (k=20) achieved AUC 0.7516, marginal improvement. Remaining time ~8 min. Analysis: Ensemble is plateauing. Need more architectural diversity. Key strategies: (1) Train LSTM model for diversity, (2) Try bootstrap sampling for training diversity, (3) Add more varied hyperparameters. Decision: Train 5-6 more diverse models (including LSTM, bootstrap, varied sizes) and submit eval.
